reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/10
reviews.comment: I've been terrified of dentists my whole life and this is the first office that made me feel at ease.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/7
reviews.comment: Super clean office, on time, and they actually explain your x-rays instead of rushing you out. Edit: still feeling great two months later.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/13
reviews.comment: Emergency visit on a Friday afternoon for my son's cracked molar — they stayed late for us.

reviewReply.comment: We're so glad you had a great visit! Thanks for trusting us with your smile.

reviews.name: accounts/1/locations/1/reviews/5
reviews.comment: In and out in 45 minutes for a filling, numb the whole time, no lecture. Great experience.
